title: Single Cell Peptide Heterogeneity of Rat Islets of Langerhans.
author: Jansson ET Comi TJ Rubakhin SS Sweedler JV
content: S-EPMC5104495 PMC5104495 Single Cell Peptide Heterogeneity of Rat Islets of Langerhans. Measuring the chemical composition of individual cells in mammalian organs can provide critical insights toward understanding the mechanisms leading to their normal and pathological function.
